item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested new transfer channel, frames it as another local repair, identifies the repeated pattern across the urgent pool, supplement queue, supervisor line, and transfer channel, and moves upstream to intake/routing responsibility and escalation-boundary redesign. It does not provide any implementation artifact for opening a new channel."}
